Implementing AI for Limited Partners

StepStone Group Thu, 03/19/2026 - 19:56

Artificial intelligence is transforming how limited partners approach investment management.

Key Applications of AI for LPs

LPs are deploying AI across several critical workflows including due diligence, portfolio monitoring, and risk assessment.

Implementation Considerations

  • Data quality and governance frameworks
  • Integration with existing portfolio management systems
  • Regulatory compliance requirements

The transition to AI-driven processes requires careful planning and a phased approach.
